introSection: Höllenblitz is a steel travelling roller coaster.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The roller coaster was introduced in 1992 and was called the Magic Mountain. In 1998, it reopened after a remodeling as Star World with a new space theme. It opened in its current form in 2007.

The roller coaster will operate at Serengeti Park until August 2019 under the name "Safari Blitz".

fullText:
Höllenblitz is a steel travelling roller coaster.

The roller coaster was introduced in 1992 and was called the Magic Mountain. In 1998, it reopened after a remodeling as Star World with a new space theme. It opened in its current form in 2007.

The roller coaster will operate at Serengeti Park until August 2019 under the name "Safari Blitz".
